title: SQLancer query with wrong results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 TIME, c1 INTEGER, c2 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (c2));
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (NULL, 1, 'test1');
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (TIME '12:00:00', NULL, 'test2');
SELECT c0 FROM t1 WHERE (c0 <> c0) IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NULL OR c0 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of NULL in comparison with TIME type
